name: Yeti
objective: The Yeti only wants to survive and humanity has stolen everything... including its children. Return the Yeti's children to remove its threat.

phases.name: Main Map

powers.name: Snow Blast
powers.description: The closest Hero or Citizen not in the Yeti's location takes 1 hit. This has no effect if everyone is in the Yeti's location.

steps.title: Let's Go Home
steps.description: Reveal the Yeti's Cave, then use Guide to escort each Yeti Child there. Once a child has arrived, a separate Advance action places it on the Yeti's mat.

steps.title: Calm the Yeti
steps.description: In the Yeti's location, use one of each type of Item to defeat it.

notes: Yeti's Children are not Citizens - guiding one to the True Cave grants no Perk Card.
Yeti's Children cannot be moved by Monster or Perk cards.
Reaching the True Cave (Guide) and being placed on the mat (Advance) are two separate actions.
